changeSet.author: opennms
changeSet.comment: Denormalize event data onto alarms for Kafka-backed event pipeline

changeSet.author: opennms
changeSet.comment: Backfill denormalized event data from existing events table
changeSet.sql: UPDATE alarms a SET event_tsid = e.eventid, event_uei = e.eventuei, event_source = e.eventsource, event_severity = e.eventseverity, event_timestamp = e.eventtime, event_node_id = e.nodeid, event_log_msg = e.eventlogmsg FROM events e WHERE a.lasteventid = e.eventid AND a.event_tsid IS NULL;

changeSet.author: opennms
changeSet.comment: Drop FK, index, and lasteventid column from alarms — events move to Kafka. Must drop node_alarms view first since it depends on lasteventid.
changeSet.createView: SELECT n.nodeid, n.nodecreatetime, n.nodeparentid, n.nodetype, n.nodesysoid, n.nodesysname, n.nodesysdescription, n.nodesyslocation, n.nodesyscontact, n.nodelabel, n.nodelabelsource, n.nodenetbiosname, n.nodedomainname, n.operatingsystem, n.lastcapsdpoll, n.foreignsource, n.foreignid, n.location, a.alarmid, a.eventuei, a.ipaddr, a.reductionkey, a.alarmtype, a.counter, a.severity, a.firsteventtime, a.lasteventtime, a.firstautomationtime, a.lastautomationtime, a.description, a.logmsg, a.operinstruct, a.tticketid, a.tticketstate, a.suppresseduntil, a.suppresseduser, a.suppressedtime, a.alarmackuser, a.alarmacktime, a.managedobjectinstance, a.managedobjecttype, a.applicationdn, a.ossprimarykey, a.x733alarmtype, a.qosalarmstate, a.clearkey, a.ifindex, a.stickymemo, a.systemid, (a.alarmacktime NOTNULL) AS acknowledged, COALESCE(s_cat.categoryname, 'no category') AS categoryname, s_cat.categorydescription, s.servicename, nas.max_alarm_severity, nas.max_alarm_severity_unack, nas.alarm_count_unack, nas.alarm_count FROM node n JOIN alarms a ON n.nodeid = a.nodeid JOIN node_alarm_status nas ON a.nodeid = nas.nodeid LEFT JOIN service s ON a.serviceid = s.serviceid LEFT JOIN category_node cat ON n.nodeid = cat.nodeid LEFT JOIN categories s_cat ON cat.categoryid = s_cat.categoryid

changeSet.author: opennms
changeSet.comment: Remove events table — events are now stored in Kafka

changeSet.author: opennms
changeSet.comment: Recreate node_outage_status and node_outages views without events table. The CASCADE on DROP TABLE events removed these views. They now use hardcoded severity 5 (Major) for outages since events are in Kafka.
changeSet.createView: SELECT node.nodeid, (CASE WHEN severity IS NULL OR severity < 3 THEN 3 ELSE severity END) AS max_outage_severity FROM ( SELECT ipif.nodeid, max(5) AS severity FROM outages JOIN ifservices ifs ON outages.ifserviceid = ifs.id JOIN ipinterface ipif ON ifs.ipinterfaceid = ipif.id WHERE outages.ifregainedservice IS NULL AND outages.perspective IS NULL GROUP BY ipif.nodeid ) AS tmp RIGHT JOIN node ON tmp.nodeid = node.nodeid

SELECT outages.outageid, outages.svclosteventid, outages.svcregainedeventid, outages.iflostservice, outages.ifregainedservice, outages.ifserviceid, 'uei.opennms.org/nodes/nodeLostService' AS svclosteventuei, NULL AS eventsource, 5 AS eventseverity, (outages.ifregainedservice IS NOT NULL) AS resolved, s.servicename, ifs.serviceid, ipif.ipaddr, COALESCE(outages.ifregainedservice - outages.iflostservice, now() - outages.iflostservice) AS duration, nos.max_outage_severity, nc.* FROM outages JOIN ifservices ifs ON outages.ifserviceid = ifs.id JOIN service s ON ifs.serviceid = s.serviceid JOIN ipinterface ipif ON ifs.ipinterfaceid = ipif.id JOIN node_categories nc ON ipif.nodeid = nc.nodeid JOIN node_outage_status nos ON nc.nodeid = nos.nodeid WHERE outages.perspective IS NULL

changeSet.author: delta-v
changeSet.comment: Denormalize event data onto outages — events table is gone, FK columns are orphaned

changeSet.author: delta-v
changeSet.comment: Drop orphaned FK columns — events table was dropped with cascadeConstraints
changeSet.createView: SELECT outages.outageid, outages.svc_lost_event_tsid, outages.svc_lost_event_uei, outages.svc_regained_event_tsid, outages.svc_regained_event_uei, outages.iflostservice, outages.ifregainedservice, outages.ifserviceid, 5 AS eventseverity, (outages.ifregainedservice IS NOT NULL) AS resolved, s.servicename, ifs.serviceid, ipif.ipaddr, COALESCE(outages.ifregainedservice - outages.iflostservice, now() - outages.iflostservice) AS duration, nos.max_outage_severity, nc.* FROM outages JOIN ifservices ifs ON outages.ifserviceid = ifs.id JOIN service s ON ifs.serviceid = s.serviceid JOIN ipinterface ipif ON ifs.ipinterfaceid = ipif.id JOIN node_categories nc ON ipif.nodeid = nc.nodeid JOIN node_outage_status nos ON nc.nodeid = nos.nodeid WHERE outages.perspective IS NULL

changeSet.author: delta-v
changeSet.comment: Drop notification tables — Notifd daemon eliminated from Delta-V

changeSet.author: delta-v
changeSet.comment: Drop orphaned event_parameters table — parent events table was dropped but cascadeConstraints only removed FKs, not child tables

changeSet.author: delta-v
changeSet.comment: Add type discriminator column to bsm_service_edge for JPA JOINED inheritance. Old Hibernate 3.6 inferred subclass type from joined tables; Jakarta Persistence requires an explicit discriminator column. Backfill from the joined subclass tables.
